qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Suppose a database consist of the following relations: SUPPLIER (SCODE,SNAME,CITY). PART (PCODE,PNAME,PDESC,CITY). PROJECTS (PRCODE,PRNAME,PRCITY). SPPR (SCODE,PCODE,PRCODE,QTY). Write algebraic solution to the following : i. Get SCODE values for suppliers who supply to both projects PR1 and PR2. ii

qids.prose: Suppose a database consist of the following relations: SUPPLIER (SCODE,SNAME,CITY). PART (PCODE,PNAME,PDESC,CITY). PROJECTS (PRCODE,PRNAME,PRCITY). SPPR (SCODE,PCODE,PRCODE,QTY). Write SQL programs corresponding to the following queries: i. Print PCODE values for parts supplied to any project in DEH

qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Suppose we have a database consisting of the following three relations. giving the parlors each student visits. indicating what kind of ice-creams each parlor serves. indicating what ice-creams each student likes.
